targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Active"
FROM stations
WHERE station_status IS NULL AND health_check IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "24h OK",
  CASE WHEN '$data_filter' = '24h_raw_ok' THEN 'all' ELSE '24h_raw_ok' END AS "next_filter"
FROM station_data_flow_status
WHERE status_24h = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Miss Offline",
  CASE WHEN '$data_filter' = '24h_miss_offline' THEN 'all' ELSE '24h_miss_offline' END AS "next_filter"
FROM station_data_flow_status f
JOIN stations s ON s.sid = f.sid
JOIN station_connectivity sc ON sc.sid = f.sid
WHERE s.station_status IS NULL AND s.health_check IS NULL
  AND f.status_24h = 2
  AND sc.connection_state = 'offline'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Miss Active",
  CASE WHEN '$data_filter' = '24h_miss_active' THEN 'all' ELSE '24h_miss_active' END AS "next_filter"
FROM station_data_flow_status f
JOIN stations s ON s.sid = f.sid
JOIN station_connectivity sc ON sc.sid = f.sid
WHERE s.station_status IS NULL AND s.health_check IS NULL
  AND f.status_24h = 2
  AND sc.is_online = true

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Degraded",
  CASE WHEN '$data_filter' = 'degraded' THEN 'all' ELSE 'degraded' END AS "next_filter"
FROM station_connectivity sc
JOIN stations s ON s.sid = sc.sid
WHERE s.station_status IS NULL AND s.health_check IS NULL
  AND sc.connection_state = 'degraded'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Persist Miss",
  CASE WHEN '$data_filter' = 'persistently_missing' THEN 'all' ELSE 'persistently_missing' END AS "next_filter"
FROM (
  SELECT m.sid
  FROM file_tracking m
  JOIN stations s ON s.sid = m.sid
  JOIN station_connectivity sc ON sc.sid = m.sid
  WHERE m.status = 'missing'
    AND m.session_type = '15s_24hr'
    AND m.file_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7
    AND s.station_status IS NULL
    AND s.health_check IS NULL
    AND sc.is_online = true
  GROUP BY m.sid
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
) t

WITH last_online AS (
  SELECT sid, MAX(ts) AS last_online_ts
  FROM block_ping_status WHERE is_online = true
  GROUP BY sid
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "LT Offline",
  CASE WHEN '$data_filter' = 'long_term_offline' THEN 'all' ELSE 'long_term_offline' END AS "next_filter"
FROM station_connectivity sc
JOIN stations s ON s.sid = sc.sid
LEFT JOIN last_online lo ON lo.sid = sc.sid
WHERE s.station_status IS NULL
  AND s.health_check IS NULL
  AND sc.connection_state = 'offline'
  AND (lo.last_online_ts IS NULL OR lo.last_online_ts < now() - interval '3 days')

WITH active AS (
  SELECT sid FROM stations WHERE station_status IS NULL AND health_check IS NULL
), completed_today AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT sid FROM download_log
  WHERE ts::date = CURRENT_DATE AND session_type = '15s_24hr' AND outcome = 'completed'
), latest_msg AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (sid) sid, message
  FROM download_log
  WHERE ts::date = CURRENT_DATE AND session_type = '15s_24hr'
  ORDER BY sid, ts DESC
), missing AS (
  SELECT a.sid, lm.message
  FROM active a
  LEFT JOIN latest_msg lm ON lm.sid = a.sid
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM completed_today c WHERE c.sid = a.sid)
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN message IS NULL                                                    THEN 'no_attempt'
    WHEN message ~* 'hardware_broken|gps_week_rollover|decommissioned'      THEN 'lifecycle'
    WHEN message ~* 'ping failed|Station unreachable'                       THEN 'unreachable'
    WHEN message ~* 'HTTP port .* not responding|HTTP refused|HTTP timeout' THEN 'port_down_http'
    WHEN message ~* 'port 2160|FTP refused|FTP timeout'                     THEN 'port_down_ftp'
    WHEN message ~* 'killed by watchdog|stall'                              THEN 'stalling'
    WHEN message ~* '500 (.*won''t open|I won''t open)|NAT'                 THEN 'nat_rejected'
    WHEN message ~* 'All file downloads failed'                             THEN 'download_rejected'
    ELSE 'other'
  END AS reason,
  COUNT(*) AS n
FROM missing
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY n DESC

WITH active AS (
  SELECT sid, receiver_type FROM stations
  WHERE station_status IS NULL AND health_check IS NULL
), completed AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT sid FROM download_log
  WHERE ts::date = CURRENT_DATE AND session_type = '15s_24hr' AND outcome = 'completed'
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(a.receiver_type, '(none)') AS "Receiver",
  COUNT(*) AS "Active",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE c.sid IS NOT NULL) AS "Delivered",
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE c.sid IS NOT NULL) AS "Missing",
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE c.sid IS NOT NULL) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 0) AS "% Today"
FROM active a
LEFT JOIN completed c ON c.sid = a.sid
GROUP BY a.receiver_type
ORDER BY (COUNT(*) - COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE c.sid IS NOT NULL)) DESC, a.receiver_type

WITH latest_msg AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (sid) sid, message, ts
  FROM download_log
  WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days'
    AND message ~* 'hardware_broken|gps_week_rollover|decommissioned|station_disabled'
  ORDER BY sid, ts DESC
)
SELECT sid AS "SID", message AS "Reason", ts AS "Last seen"
FROM latest_msg ORDER BY ts DESC

panels.title: Main Delivery Table (one row per active station)

targets.rawSql:
WITH areas AS (
  SELECT sam.sid, string_agg(sa.area_name, ', ' ORDER BY sa.area_name) AS area_list
  FROM station_area_members sam
  JOIN station_areas sa ON sa.area_id = sam.area_id
  GROUP BY sam.sid
), latest_fail AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (sid) sid, message
  FROM download_log
  WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 day'
    AND session_type = '15s_24hr'
    AND outcome <> 'completed'
  ORDER BY sid, ts DESC
)
SELECT
  d.station_id AS "SID",
  d.receiver_type AS "Receiver",
  a.area_list AS "Area",
  f.status_24h AS "24hR",
  f.raw_24h_date::text AS "24h Date",
  f.rinex_24h_status AS "RNX",
  CASE
    WHEN f.status_24h = 0 THEN NULL
    WHEN lf.message IS NULL THEN 'no_attempt'
    WHEN lf.message ~* 'hardware_broken|gps_week_rollover|decommissioned'      THEN 'lifecycle'
    WHEN lf.message ~* 'ping failed|Station unreachable'                       THEN 'unreachable'
    WHEN lf.message ~* 'HTTP port .* not responding|HTTP refused|HTTP timeout' THEN 'port_down_http'
    WHEN lf.message ~* 'port 2160|FTP refused|FTP timeout'                     THEN 'port_down_ftp'
    WHEN lf.message ~* 'killed by watchdog|stall'                              THEN 'stalling'
    WHEN lf.message ~* '500 (.*won''t open|I won''t open)|NAT'                 THEN 'nat_rejected'
    WHEN lf.message ~* 'All file downloads failed'                             THEN 'download_rejected'
    ELSE 'other'
  END AS "Reason",
  f.download_status AS "DL",
  d.last_download_at AS "Last DL",
  ROUND(d.avg_speed_bps / 1024.0, 1) AS "KB/s",
  d.stalls AS "Stalls",
  d.download_failures AS "Fails"
FROM station_dashboard_data d
LEFT JOIN station_data_flow_status f ON f.sid = d.station_id
LEFT JOIN areas a ON a.sid = d.station_id
LEFT JOIN stations s ON s.sid = d.station_id
LEFT JOIN latest_fail lf ON lf.sid = d.station_id
WHERE ('$area' = 'all' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM station_area_members sam WHERE sam.sid = d.station_id AND sam.area_id = '$area'))
  AND (${station:singlequote} = 'all' OR d.station_id = ${station:singlequote})
  AND (${receiver:singlequote} = 'all' OR (${receiver:singlequote} = 'NONE' AND d.receiver_type IS NULL) OR d.receiver_type = ${receiver:singlequote})
  AND (${antenna:singlequote} = 'all' OR (${antenna:singlequote} = 'NONE' AND d.antenna_type IS NULL) OR d.antenna_type = ${antenna:singlequote})
  AND (${owner:singlequote} = 'all' OR s.station_owner = ${owner:singlequote})
  AND ('$data_filter' = 'all'
    OR ('$data_filter' = '24h_raw_ok'      AND f.status_24h = 0)
    OR ('$data_filter' = '24h_miss_offline' AND f.status_24h = 2 AND d.station_id IN (
       SELECT sc4.sid FROM station_connectivity sc4 WHERE sc4.connection_state = 'offline'))
    OR ('$data_filter' = '24h_miss_active'  AND f.status_24h = 2 AND d.station_id IN (
       SELECT sc5.sid FROM station_connectivity sc5 WHERE sc5.is_online = true))
    OR ('$data_filter' = 'degraded' AND d.station_id IN (
       SELECT sc6.sid FROM station_connectivity sc6 WHERE sc6.connection_state = 'degraded'))
    OR ('$data_filter' = 'persistently_missing' AND d.station_id IN (
       SELECT m.sid FROM file_tracking m
       JOIN station_connectivity sc2 ON sc2.sid = m.sid
       WHERE m.status = 'missing' AND m.session_type = '15s_24hr'
         AND m.file_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7
         AND sc2.is_online = true
       GROUP BY m.sid HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3))
    OR ('$data_filter' = 'long_term_offline' AND d.station_id IN (
       SELECT sc3.sid FROM station_connectivity sc3
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT sid, MAX(ts) AS last_online_ts FROM block_ping_status WHERE is_online = true GROUP BY sid) lo3 ON lo3.sid = sc3.sid
       WHERE sc3.connection_state = 'offline'
         AND (lo3.last_online_ts IS NULL OR lo3.last_online_ts < now() - interval '3 days')))
    OR ('$data_filter' = 'dl_warning'      AND f.download_status = 1)
    OR ('$data_filter' = 'dl_critical'     AND f.download_status = 2)
    OR ('$data_filter' = 'stalling'        AND d.stalls >= 1)
    OR ('$data_filter' = 'slow_speed'      AND d.avg_speed_bps IS NOT NULL AND d.avg_speed_bps < 10240)
    OR ('$data_filter' = 'passive'         AND d.health_check = 'passive')
    OR ('$data_filter' = 'inactive'        AND d.station_status IS NOT NULL)
    OR ('$data_filter' LIKE 'reason_%' AND f.status_24h <> 0 AND CASE
         WHEN lf.message IS NULL THEN 'reason_no_attempt'
         WHEN lf.message ~* 'hardware_broken|gps_week_rollover|decommissioned'      THEN 'reason_lifecycle'
         WHEN lf.message ~* 'ping failed|Station unreachable'                       THEN 'reason_unreachable'
         WHEN lf.message ~* 'HTTP port .* not responding|HTTP refused|HTTP timeout' THEN 'reason_port_down_http'
         WHEN lf.message ~* 'port 2160|FTP refused|FTP timeout'                     THEN 'reason_port_down_ftp'
         WHEN lf.message ~* 'killed by watchdog|stall'                              THEN 'reason_stalling'
         WHEN lf.message ~* '500 (.*won''t open|I won''t open)|NAT'                 THEN 'reason_nat_rejected'
         WHEN lf.message ~* 'All file downloads failed'                             THEN 'reason_download_rejected'
         ELSE 'reason_other'
       END = '$data_filter')
  )
  AND ('$data_filter' IN ('passive','inactive') OR (d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL))
ORDER BY f.status_24h DESC NULLS LAST, f.rinex_24h_status DESC NULLS LAST, d.station_id

WITH active AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*)::float AS n
  FROM stations
  WHERE station_status IS NULL AND health_check IS NULL
), days AS (
  SELECT generate_series(
    GREATEST(($__timeFrom())::date, CURRENT_DATE - 30),
    LEAST(($__timeTo())::date, CURRENT_DATE),
    '1 day'::interval
  )::date AS d
)
SELECT
  days.d AS time,
  100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT ft.sid) FILTER (
    WHERE ft.session_type = '15s_24hr'
      AND ft.status IN ('downloaded', 'archived')
  ) / NULLIF((SELECT n FROM active), 0) AS "24h raw",
  100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT ft.sid) FILTER (
    WHERE ft.session_type = '15s_24hr_rinex'
      AND ft.status IN ('downloaded', 'archived')
  ) / NULLIF((SELECT n FROM active), 0) AS "24h RINEX"
FROM days
LEFT JOIN file_tracking ft ON ft.file_date = days.d
GROUP BY days.d
ORDER BY days.d

panels.title: Daily completeness · % of active stations delivering per day

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'completed')     AS "Completed",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'stall_timeout') AS "Stall",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'failed')        AS "Failed",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'unreachable')   AS "Unreachable",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'expected')      AS "Expected"
FROM download_log
WHERE ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND session_type = '15s_24hr'
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Download outcomes (15s_24hr · stacked, by hour)  ⚠ denominator: ATTEMPTS

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Active PolaRX5"
FROM stations
WHERE station_status IS NULL AND health_check IS NULL
  AND receiver_type = 'PolaRX5'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ft.sid) AS "Delivering today"
FROM file_tracking ft
JOIN stations s ON s.sid = ft.sid
 WHERE s.station_status IS NULL AND s.health_check IS NULL
  AND s.receiver_type = 'PolaRX5'
  AND ft.session_type = 'status_1hr'
  AND ft.file_date = CURRENT_DATE

WITH active AS (
  SELECT sid FROM stations
  WHERE station_status IS NULL AND health_check IS NULL AND receiver_type = 'PolaRX5'
), delivering AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT sid FROM file_tracking
  WHERE session_type = 'status_1hr' AND file_date = CURRENT_DATE
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Need investigation"
FROM active a
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM delivering d WHERE d.sid = a.sid)

panels.title: Hourly Metadata Snapshots (status_1hr · receiver-side config, not science data)
Audit Log (download_log · last 200 events in time range)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ts AS "Time",
  sid AS "Station",
  session_type AS "Session",
  outcome AS "Outcome",
  duration_seconds AS "Dur (s)",
  bytes_downloaded AS "Bytes",
  ROUND((avg_speed_bps / 1024.0)::numeric, 1) AS "KB/s",
  attempt AS "Att",
  message AS "Message"
FROM download_log
WHERE ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND (${station:singlequote} = 'all' OR sid = ${station:singlequote})
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Arrival distribution (15s_24hr · daily buckets · PR #60 watch)

panels.description: Per-day distribution of time-from-first-attempt to successful completion for the 15s_24hr daily file. Watch the 30-60 min bucket compress after PR #60 (watchdog fix). Driving question: why are 43 stations only landing in backfill?

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  to_char(day_utc, 'MM-DD') AS day,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE arrival_bucket = '00-under_1min')      AS "Under 1 min",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE arrival_bucket = '01-1-5min')          AS "1-5 min",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE arrival_bucket = '02-5-15min')         AS "5-15 min",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE arrival_bucket = '03-15-30min')        AS "15-30 min",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE arrival_bucket = '04-30-60min')        AS "30-60 min",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE arrival_bucket = '05-1-3hr')           AS "1-3 hr",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE arrival_bucket = '06-over_3hr')        AS "Over 3 hr",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE arrival_bucket = '99-never_completed') AS "Never"
FROM daily_arrival_15s_24hr
WHERE day_utc >= CURRENT_DATE - 14
GROUP BY day_utc
ORDER BY day_utc

panels.title: Arrival distribution · last 14 days (15s_24hr)

panels.description: Today's 15s_24hr arrival distribution. One bar per bucket. Watch the 'Under 1 min' bar grow and the '30-60 min' / 'Never' bars shrink after PR #60 deployment.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  'today' AS day,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE arrival_bucket = '00-under_1min')      AS "Under 1 min",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE arrival_bucket = '01-1-5min')          AS "1-5 min",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE arrival_bucket = '02-5-15min')         AS "5-15 min",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE arrival_bucket = '03-15-30min')        AS "15-30 min",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE arrival_bucket = '04-30-60min')        AS "30-60 min",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE arrival_bucket = '05-1-3hr')           AS "1-3 hr",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE arrival_bucket = '06-over_3hr')        AS "Over 3 hr",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE arrival_bucket = '99-never_completed') AS "Never"
FROM daily_arrival_15s_24hr
WHERE day_utc = CURRENT_DATE

panels.title: Arrival distribution · today (15s_24hr)

panels.description: Today's slow tail (>30 min to complete) and never-completed stations for the 15s_24hr daily fire. live_failure_kind tells you which class to investigate (stall_timeout = PR #60 target, unreachable = network/router, file_not_ready = receiver clock or file rollover).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  sid                                              AS "Station",
  arrival_bucket                                   AS "Bucket",
  time_to_complete_min                             AS "Min to complete",
  n_failed_attempts                                AS "Retry attempts",
  live_failure_kind                                AS "Live failure kind",
  to_char(completed_at, 'HH24:MI:SS')              AS "Completed at (UTC)"
FROM daily_arrival_15s_24hr
WHERE day_utc = CURRENT_DATE
  AND (completed_at IS NULL OR time_to_complete_min >= 30)
ORDER BY completed_at NULLS LAST, sid

panels.title: Today's slow tail (>30 min) + never-completed

list.definition: SELECT 'all' AS __value, 'All Stations' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT area_id AS __value, area_name || ' (' || area_type || ')' AS __text FROM station_areas ORDER BY __text
list.label: Area
list.name: area
list.query: SELECT 'all' AS __value, 'All Stations' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT area_id AS __value, area_name || ' (' || area_type || ')' AS __text FROM station_areas ORDER BY __text

list.definition: SELECT 'all' AS station_owner UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT station_owner FROM stations WHERE station_owner IS NOT NULL ORDER BY station_owner
list.label: Agency
list.name: owner
list.query: SELECT 'all' AS station_owner UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT station_owner FROM stations WHERE station_owner IS NOT NULL ORDER BY station_owner

list.definition: SELECT 'all' AS sid UNION ALL SELECT sid FROM stations ORDER BY sid
list.label: Station
list.name: station
list.query: SELECT 'all' AS sid UNION ALL SELECT sid FROM stations ORDER BY sid

list.definition: SELECT 'all' AS receiver_type UNION ALL SELECT 'NONE' AS receiver_type UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT receiver_type FROM stations WHERE receiver_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY receiver_type

list.name: receiver
list.query: SELECT 'all' AS receiver_type UNION ALL SELECT 'NONE' AS receiver_type UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT receiver_type FROM stations WHERE receiver_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY receiver_type
